title: Great Sea (disambiguation)
content:
A number of planets across the [[Galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]] had bodies of waters or seas which had the name '''Great Sea''' including the following:

*The [[Great Sea of Artorias|Great Sea]] on [[Artorias]].
*The [[Great Sea of Bandomeer|Great Sea]] on [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]].
*The [[Great Sea (Kalarba)|Great Sea]] on [[Kalarba/Legends|Kalarba]].
*The [[Great Zelosi Sea]] located on [[Zelos II]]

{{Disambig}}
